prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: IGE-NPT-SWORDTHROWINGKNIVES-ORG Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: Ninja Sword Full Tang Blade with 2 Throwing Knives Sheath Survival Set - Orange Description: Practice and perfect your your ninja skills with the Ninja Sword and 2pc Throwing Knife Set.

The sword measures 27" in length and comes with two 5" throwing knives. This set comes with a nylon sheath with a compartment for the ninja sword along with a small compartment to hold both the throwing knives. The nylon sheath has a shoulder strap for easy transportation on your shoulder or belt.

The 440 stainless steel construction will keep these knives in great condition through many practice sessions. The solid piece of steel from tip to handle ensures you wont have to worry about losing rivets or parts of the handle if you accidentally hit a rock.

There are multiple color options so make sure you order multiple to collect all the colors. This is a perfect gift for any adult or ninja fan. Search Terms: throwing knives throwing stars swords and knives swords knives swords Features: - Amazing Ninja Sword and 2 Throwing Knives Set - Extremely Sharp Blade Perfect for Chopping and Slashing Objects - Constructed of Strong 440 Stainless Steel - Nylon Carrying Case for Easy Transportation - Sword Length: 27" | Throwing Knife Length: 5" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical Ninja Sword and 2 Throwing Knives Orange Set
